calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jak S. Marquez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chinatown Community Development Center, Inc.
Patrick Chung, on site property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Agnes Lee, on site property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Chun Mo Tam.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 17, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chinatown Community Development Center, Inc., and against defendant Chun Mo Tam as follows:

Holdover Damages - $1,399.84.
Costs - $263.00.
Total - $1,662.84.

Additionally, plaintiff Chinatown Community Development Center, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 657 Clay Street, #68, San Francisco, CA 94111. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk F. Green/ N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Richard Beckman, Esq. for Plaintiff Chinatown Community Development Center, Inc.
Ted Janowsky, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant Chun Mo Tam.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle,
Trial date of Nov. 30, 2009 remains.
